text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I ran way too much and now my legs feel like a
couple of logs...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess it's time to call it a day, right? Well, nice
work out there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hi there, Sei! You done with training for today?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep, sure am. How about you, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I was thinking about doing a little more.
There's this technique I just can't get down.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself too hard. You won't get any
better if you just throw yourself at it without
thinking.
choice_data_list: Why don't you do some running together?

True. It's important to take good care of your
body.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I couldn't ask that. Sei was just about to go
home...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Fine, guess I really should. You are my
friend after all, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaay, awesome! Thanks, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, just let me take a tiny break before we—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Sei! Let's get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: J-just a mo—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! Here we gooo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, let go! I'm not gonna run off, y'know! Uh, I mean, I am gonna run, but with you, not away!

And so, the two train together right up until
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep. I think it's about time we called it a
night.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The next race is coming up soon, so... I guess you're right. Let's end it here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! We can head home together, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure. Not like I've got anything else going
on.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ♪ Let's get some food on the way! I was
thinking some place with a big eating challenge...
Growl...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, my stomache can't say no to that. Go ahead
and take me to your favorite spot.

After stopping by somewhere to eat, Seiun Sky
and Special Week head home.
